questions.q: On May 18, 2026, Indian EV manufacturer Oben Electric announced that which of its newly launched electric motorcycle models had surpassed 25,000 bookings in just 15 days?
What is the name of the new Windows zero-day privilege escalation exploit that provides attackers with SYSTEM access on fully patched systems?
Which Canadian Conservative MP arrived in Taiwan in May 2026 to meet with President Lai Ching-te, defying a direct warning from China's ambassador?
A Canadian isolating in British Columbia tested presumptive positive for the Andes strain of hantavirus after returning from a cruise on which ship?
What iconic building in Dawson City, Yukon, colloquially known as 'The Pit', was tragically destroyed by a fire in May 2026?
What order did a South Korean court issue regarding the 2026 Samsung union strike?
options: The strike must not impact chip production volume
The strike must end within 24 hours
Strikers are banned from demonstrating near the headquarters
The union must pay a daily fine to the government
questions.correctText: The strike must not impact chip production volume

questions.q: Public Safety Canada was hit with a Community Note on X in May 2026 after trying to downplay the true scope of which new surveillance legislation?
Newly elected federal NDP leader Avi Lewis spoke to a packed crowd on his party rebuild tour at which Saskatoon venue in May 2026?
